  • Uses of Action in edu.bu.pas.risk.action

    Classes in edu.bu.pas.risk.action that implement Action
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final record 
    AttackAction
    Represents an action to attack a territory from another territory.
    final record 
    FortifyAction
    Represents an action to fortify troops from one of your territories to another one of your connected territories.
    final record 
    NoAction
    A no-op action.
    final record 
    RedeemCardsAction
    Redeems armies from the agent's owned territory cards.
    Methods in edu.bu.pas.risk.action that return Action
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Action
    Action.clone()
    Returns a deep copy of this action.
